Weather APIs for Every Use Case
OpenWeather provides global weather data APIs for current conditions, forecasts, historical archives, air quality, maps, and industry-specific use cases. Explore the product families below to find the API that fits your application, workflow, or business need.
Get API key
API Docs
Featured API
One Call API 3.0
One Call API 3.0 All-in-One Weather Data, One Simple Call The Business Access real-time weather, hourly & daily forecasts, national alerts, and historical data — all through a single, streamlined API request. Whether you’re building apps, dashboards, or climate models, One Call API 3.0 is your all-purpose solution. Current Conditions Temperature, humidity, wind, pressure & more — updated every minute 1-Minute to 8-Day Forecasts Up to 8 days forecast with sunrise/sunset, min/max, and weather icons 47+ years of History Up to 40 years back (hourly/daily) for any location globally Government Alerts Government-issued national alerts (e.g. NOAA, EUMETNET) Daily Aggregations Daily aggregated weather data for 47+ years archive and 1.5 years ahead forecast AI Weather Summary Get weather data and weather-related advice in a human-readable and friendly format Subscribe Explore API Doc
All-in-One Weather Data, One Simple Call
Access real-time weather, hourly & daily forecasts, national alerts, and historical data — all through a single, streamlined API request. Whether you’re building apps, dashboards, or climate models, One Call API 3.0 is your all-purpose solution.

Specialized APIs Road Risk API Specify your route and get weather data and national alerts for the point of destination and along the route Current, forecast for 5 days and historical weather data for 1 year for your route Weather data are available for any point on the globe To receive information on price and get a quote, please contact us Get a quote API Docs
Road Risk API
Specify your route and get weather data and national alerts for the point of destination and along the route
Current, forecast for 5 days and historical weather data for 1 year for your route
Weather data are available for any point on the globe
To receive information on price and get a quote, please contact us
Get a quote
Solar & Energy Solar Irradiance API Get the solar data by particular location and calculate energy generation! GHI , DNI , DHI indices for clear sky and cloudy sky models Current data and forecast for 15 days ahead solar irradiation data 47+ years of historical data (from January 1, 1979) Daily aggregation with 1-hour and 15-minutes step detalization for specified day Available worldwide Get API Docs

GHI , DNI , DHI indices for clear sky and cloudy sky models
Current data and forecast for 15 days ahead solar irradiation data
47+ years of historical data (from January 1, 1979)
Daily aggregation with 1-hour and 15-minutes step detalization for specified day
Available worldwide

Tools & Integrations Geocoding API Geocoding API supports both the direct and reverse methods, working at the level of city names, areas and districts, countries and states You can cap how many locations with the same name or the nearby geographic coordinates will be seen in the API response Included in both free and paid subscriptions Subscribe API Docs
Geocoding API
Geocoding API supports both the direct and reverse methods, working at the level of city names, areas and districts, countries and states
You can cap how many locations with the same name or the nearby geographic coordinates will be seen in the API response
Tools & Integrations Weather Stations API for managing your personal weather stations Connect your stations and transfer the measurements Receive the aggregated measurements from the station Included in both free and paid subscriptions Subscribe API Docs

How to get started
Sign Up & Get Your API Key Create an account on OpenWeather to access your dashboard and generate your unique API key. This key is required for all API requests. Create account
Sign Up & Get Your API Key
Create an account on OpenWeather to access your dashboard and generate your unique API key. This key is required for all API requests.

Company
OpenWeather is a London-based weather intelligence company serving enterprises, developers, businesses, and researchers worldwide. Through its developer business, the company provides global weather data and forecasting services via fast, reliable APIs, delivering historical, current, and forecast weather data for any location worldwide. Combining advanced meteorology, AI-enhanced forecasting models, and scalable data infrastructure, OpenWeather helps customers integrate weather intelligence into applications, services, and operational workflows.
